summary: Security review completed for secret scanning, credential handling, OIDC workflow auth, and blob container anonymous access controls.

checks.name: gitleaks full history
checks.evidence: gitleaks git --no-banner --redact --exit-code 1 . returned exit code 0 with no leaks found

checks.name: No hardcoded credentials in target files
checks.evidence: trapi_client.py and src/blob_writer.py use DefaultAzureCredential and environment configuration; no secrets or connection strings hardcoded

checks.name: Workflows use OIDC without client secrets
checks.evidence: Workflows use azure/login with id-token: write and no client-secret field; cd.yml uses vars for Azure IDs

checks.name: Blob container anonymous access disabled
checks.evidence: infra/main.bicep enforces roster container publicAccess: None and cd-infra.yml validates container public access remains private
